title: [PAS] Player Pickaxes
description: Pickaxes becomes a player when renamed... so strange.
body:
## PACK REQUIRE [PLAYER ARMOR STANDS](https://modrinth.com/mod/player-armor-stands) 0.9.0+!!!
![demo](https://github.com/Danrus1100/PlayerArmorStand/blob/main/assets/ezgif-5993f86e3321c17f.gif?raw=true)
Rename your pickaxe and it will become a player in T-pose! Yah its looks wierd, but why not?
### Special thanks:
 - [Semionel](https://modrinth.com/user/Semionel) for helping with creating items model defenitions
